$comment: Single source of truth for pricing facts pushed to every storefront surface (product.json dispatch, and eventually website copy generation). Matches the live billing implementations: Gumroad one-time product + Stripe checkout mode:'payment'. Change HERE first, then re-release. Consumed by scripts/build-product-json.mjs.

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.notes: Free forever — the COMPLETE 1,137-rule engine (every framework, every compliance pack) plus 6 starter agents. FSL-1.1-MIT (→ MIT 2030).

tiers.name: Full Pantheon
tiers.notes: One-time purchase, lifetime updates via Gumroad re-download. No subscription. Every governance rule is free — this buys the 67-god agent pack.
